headline: 2 Value Stocks to Consider Right Now and 1 We Turn Down
summary: Value investing has produced some of the world’s most famous investing billionaires, including Warren Buffett, David Einhorn, and Seth Klarman, who built their fortunes by purchasing wonderful businesses at reasonable prices. But these hidden gems are few and far between - many stocks that appear cheap often stay that way because they face structural issues.

raw.summary: Value investing has produced some of the world’s most famous investing billionaires, including Warren Buffett, David Einhorn, and Seth Klarman, who built their fortunes by purchasing wonderful businesses at reasonable prices. But these hidden gems are few and far between - many stocks that appear cheap often stay that way because they face structural issues.

headline: Charles Schwab (SCHW) Reports Record May Core Net New Assets
summary: The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) is one of the 12 High Quality Stocks to Buy for the Long Term. On June 12, 2026, The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) reported that core net new assets increased 43% versus May 2025 to $49.9B, a record for the month of May. Total client assets reached $13.14T at month-end […]

headline: AI in focus, Iran talks advance - What’s moving markets
summary: Investing.com - U.S. stock futures recover some early losses on Monday, after Iran signals progress in peace talks with Washington, helping ease fears of a renewed escalation in the Middle East. Investors were also keeping a close eye on the artificial intelligence sector after President Donald Trump softened his stance on Anthropic following a week of turmoil over export restrictions.
